parsed_review.summary: CP00-661 (Admin Console failure recovery Hermes evidence bridge descriptor slice; risk C; 150 units; RP21.P07.M06.S09-RP21.P08.M04.S19) passes independent read-only review. Counts are internally consistent and all sum to 150 across the prompt, registry requirements, baseline included_units, validators, and tests (deliverable 51+24+48+4+10+8+5; phase P07:89/P08:61; micro-phase and micro-title distributions). The slice is strictly descriptor-only and runtime-closed: freezeCp661Result forces ~35 hazard flags to false and freezes, no writeFileSync/fetch/child_process/spawn exists in packages/admin/src, and validateAdminConsoleCp661FailureRecoveryHermesEvidenceBridgeDescriptor enforces 31 false-flags plus contract/runtime-boundary closure (executes_failure_recovery_runtime, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt, executes_hermes_command_runtime, persists_review_packet, exposes_blocked_claim_detail/unauthorized_count all false). No-real-data/no-write attestations are substantive and pack-bound (no_real_data:true, writes_product_state:false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation:false). Authority boundary is intact: promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false is set in the attestation, contract, and validator-checked; the Claude packet is read_only:true; Claude is not final approver. Hermes is used only for deterministic evidence packet/receipt labeling (runtime_receipt_emitted:false, hermes_runtime_opened:false). Critically, the pack makes no premature production_ready claim: manifest production_ready:false/runtime_ready:false/in_progress, command-evidence gate_outcome pre_review_passed_pending_hardened_claude_review, construction-inspection PENDING_REVIEW, adjudication pending - all correctly defer the descriptor_verified flag to this review, which supports closeout. Review-harness hardening passes (prompt 2717B<25600, read-tools-only, no forbidden tools, summary-only prohibited and unused, auth preflight exit 0 with 1428B valid-JSON non-empty stdout, schema present, no omitted active untracked impl files). Continuity is preserved (CP660->661/S09, 661->662/S20; current_pack CP00-661 with prior packs historical and deep-equality enforced by validate-rp21-admin-console-contract.mjs). Provenance: source and evidence artifacts were directly re-read via Read/Grep/Glob; the command exit codes in command-evidence.json (npm test, npm run validate, etc.) are builder-asserted and were not re-executed under the read-only constraint, though the source they exercise was verified. blocks_goal_closeout is false: per the authority boundary the human/enterprise-trust approval is outside this receipt and the pack claims neither runtime nor enterprise trust. No P0/P1/P2/P3 findings.
